name: rldyour-mcps
description: Controlled rldyour MCP server runtime set for Codex auto skills, with explicit runtime, startup, browser capability, and safety rules.

interface.shortDescription: Approved MCP runtime for rldyour auto skills
interface.longDescription: This plugin connects the owner's approved MCP server set for Codex: Serena, Sequential Thinking, Playwright, Chrome DevTools, Context7, DeepWiki, Grep by Vercel, Semgrep, shadcn, Dart/Flutter, and Figma. It is the runtime dependency layer for automatic workflow plugins such as rldyour-explore, rldyour-browser, rldyour-security, rldyour-serena-mcp, and rldyour-design. Playwright MCP runs headless with network, storage, testing, and devtools capabilities enabled for full browser validation workflows. The plugin does not define global agent behavior and does not store secrets. It is responsible only for MCP transport configuration; specialized skills, memory policies, security rules, and workflow commands belong in separate plugins. User-facing conversation remains Russian unless the owner asks otherwise, while repository documentation is written in English.
defaultPrompt: Choose the right MCP for this task.
Check MCP availability without writing data.
